name: Eastern Mari
notes: Meadow Mari / Eastern Mari (олык марий) — Uralic (Mari) language of the Mari El Republic, Russia. Written in a Cyrillic-based Mari alphabet, i.e. the Russian alphabet plus ҥ, ӧ, ӱ (and ӓ in Hill Mari). GRAPHEME INVENTORY NOT YET SPECIFIED: reliable mapping requires modelling the palatalisation/iotation conventions inherited from Cyrillic and the reduced vowel ⟨ы⟩, plus the language's non-initial stress placement. INPUT CONTRACT: input is expected in the Cyrillic Meadow Mari orthography.
